{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321222322A9462F6EA0DBBCEEDC3B"}"},"total":55},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7405113781803811622","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的超有趣！不白吃用漫画的形式解读《山海经》，让那些奇珍异兽都变得可爱起来。我特别喜欢书里关于食物的部分，原来古人这么会吃！而且还能学到很多知识，简直是一本上古动植物食用指南。推荐给喜欢美食和知识的小伙伴们！","text_exts":[{"e":24,"s":21,"text":"山海经","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774103002BCEEDC3B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227405113781803811622%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227140567943212960781%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722495823,"group_id":"7140567943212960781","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"心碎，完全心碎。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N48d4bVQsTm70Uk8qJ2vMY8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cf2cbe60f7324cddaf7c46410d8311d1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621042&x-signature=aI%2FXhrR2lCFD6rxUsN22qRvy%2BWc%3D","user_id":"220369423184285","user_name":"悸动.._"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"220369423184285","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140567943212960781","book_info":{"abstract":"好玩又能吃的漫画《山海经》！
《山海经》是中国上古百科奇书，古今语怪之祖，鲁迅先生称之为“宝书”。
《不白吃话山海经》根据原文改编，美食漫画家不白吃游历《山海经》里的名山大海，探险奇珍异兽。发现水里游的、地上跑的、天上飞的都能吃，就连矿石都能舔一舔。
原来我们华夏民族骨子里就有吃货的基因！
吃了祝余草，就不会觉得饿；吃了迷毂花，就再也不会迷路；吃了鹿蜀就能儿孙满堂……
超有趣，超生动，脑洞大开，轻松读懂《山海经》。
献给渴望知识、热爱美食的大人和小孩，跟着不白吃，做一个有文化的吃货！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ec179953ac242923a6a4542f896be82f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"我是不白吃","author_id":"","book_id":"7140567943212960781","book_name":"不白吃话山海经（超有趣！教你做个有文化的吃货！）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0a0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"21.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":941,"name":"文学经典","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941&name=文学经典&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":116,"name":"国学","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=116&name=国学&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7475281065926462526","read_count":"1417","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"15612"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"30","tags":"文学经典,国学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ec179953ac242923a6a4542f896be82f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779287002&x-signature=hpCMNrNUfNVYYZwhGO6ikTVBdSc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321222322A9462F6EA0DBBCEEDC3B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":1,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9660,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":411},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7197348068344841000","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看
